name: Blueberry Snow
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water in a mixing bowl; set aside 10 minutes to soften.
2. Add boiling water and stir to completely dissolve. If gelatin does not dissolve completely, heat slightly. Set aside.
3. Combine blueberries, lemon juice, and sugar replacement in a mixing bowl or food processor and whip into a puree.
4. Stir the blueberry puree into the gelatin mixture until combined.
5. When the blueberry mixture is cool, thick, and syrupy, beat until frothy.
6. Fold the stiffly beaten egg whites into the blueberry mixture.
7. Spoon into 6 serving dishes; refrigerate until set.
8. Before serving, top with fresh strawberries.
